---
title: "GRPO Training Pipeline Setup Notes"
description: "Technical setup notes for the GRPO training pipeline on MedEnv tasks."
date: "2026-02-26"
categories: [rl, medenv, infra]
---

## Environment

- Base model: Llama-3-70B (4-bit quantized for dev, full precision for final runs)
- Framework: TRL + custom MedEnv integration
- Hardware: 4x A100 80GB

## Training Config

```python
training_config = {
    "group_size": 8,          # completions per prompt
    "learning_rate": 1e-6,
    "kl_coeff": 0.05,
    "max_turns": 15,          # max conversation turns per episode
    "batch_size": 32,         # prompts per batch
    "gradient_accumulation": 4,
}
```

## Issues Encountered

**OOM on long trajectories** — multi-turn conversations with 15 turns × 8 group samples blows up memory. Current workaround: truncate to 10 turns max during training, evaluate on full 15.

**FHIR validation bottleneck** — the FHIR server becomes the bottleneck when validating 8 parallel trajectories. Need to batch validation calls or run a local validator.

**Reward normalization** — raw rewards are in [0, 1] but the group baseline can push advantages to extreme values. Added reward clipping at ±3 std.

## TODO

- [ ] Profile the FHIR validation bottleneck
- [ ] Try group sizes {4, 8, 16} to find the sweet spot
- [ ] Set up W&B logging for reward distributions per task type
